_comment: Machine-readable skill routing. Agent reads at Boot B2 (grep keywords only) to match intent → load skill. on_demand_files = lookup table for G2 only — NOT auto-loaded at B3.
_schema_note: context_files renamed to on_demand_files v2.1. Each entry: { path, when, how }. 'how' values: grep_only | targeted (offset+limit) | full_ok (small files ≤30 lines only).

boot_read_policy._note: Files that MAY be read at boot — all others are on_demand only
boot_read_policy.B3_sections_only: Read SKILL.md offset=1 limit=80 — sections[] and skill name only

model_routing.notes: haiku FLOOR_OK=yes all 7Q; medium+high comprehend. recommended=sonnet-high (structural reasoning + Cycle grouping + schema reconciliation). High-tier flagged 6; verified 2026-06-11 = 0 real defects (Q2 skill-changed=Boot B3 sha1sum global FP; Q3 read-after-write covered L99 cross-dep, minor; Q4 2nd-ambiguous=default-wait safe, minor; Q5 dual-source=L150 schema-wins FP; Q5 120L=L176 split-rule, minor; Q6 [check]-written=global R12 signal FP).

mece.trigger: Loop Phase 2 — runs once per task after Info Gather Loop. Builds section-based plan mapping 1:1 to target Skill sections[].
keywords: ปรับโครงสร้าง
mece.skip_when: read-only task OR single file edit with backlinks=0 AND no ERR documentation needed

model_routing.notes: always_loaded persona skill — also given a skills{} entry to hold certification. haiku FLOOR_OK=yes all 7Q; medium+high comprehend. recommended=haiku (one-shot mechanical: match trigger -> load context -> emit short response -> STOP; no branching/file-writes/coordination). High-tier flagged 4; verified 2026-06-11 = 0 real defects (Q1 platform-or-context-check explained L28 FP; Q2 trigger-check-vs-always-on = two layers persona-always-on + response-workflow FP; Q5 unknown-skill fallback=omit-skill-line L33 FP; Q6 no-gate covered by one-shot->STOP L42, minor).

identity.trigger: Identity query (who/what are you, introduce yourself) OR boot-trace confirmation. Persona constraints apply passively at all times.
identity.skip_when: never skipped — persona always-on; one-shot identity RESPONSE fires only on explicit identity query

model_routing.notes: All 3 tiers comprehend doc; floor=haiku confirmed. recommended=sonnet because work is multi-step code-writing (harness routing: MODEL_HIGH @ medium). High-tier flagged 3 doc items; all 3 adversarially verified 2026-06-11 = 0 real defects (C1 parallel-ordering: coder is sequential L61 = false-positive; C2 scope>3 gate exists L44 = false-positive; C3 prereq order numbered L64/65 = false-positive).

model_routing.notes: haiku failed only Q6 (negative-answer artifact: automated skill never waits, same pattern as token_tracker); mid+high correct; 2 REAL defects FIXED: (1) L123 vs L75/L77 used_in manual contradiction reworded to symbol_indexer.py authoritative manual-seed-OK; (2) Workflow omitted symbol_indexer.py step for non-edit types vs BC L89 mandates all change types - added explicit step for ALL types; floor=sonnet (active multi-branch JSON mutation + contradiction = low-tier index-corruption risk per high-tier) recommended=sonnet

model_routing.notes: 3-tier probe: haiku FLOOR_OK=no (Q6 confirm-point unclear), sonnet FLOOR_OK=yes -> floor=sonnet. 5 high-tier flags = 4 FP/minor + 1 real-but-global ambiguity (reset-5-fields matches L174, LOOP_WEIGHT intentionally excluded = FP; token bands 60/80/90k OVERLAP at 80-90k: L82 >60k=ask-and-WAIT vs L83 >80k=do-NOT-wait both fire = REAL ambiguity for low-tier readers, but inherited VERBATIM from global CLAUDE.md R3 L61 -> proper fix = make bands exclusive in harness-core (deferred, needs confirm), NOT a skill-local defect; Completion-Gate-Reviewer = AGENTS.md global = FP; /tmp/mh.md PATH A + SKILL_detail @ref = global convention/design pattern minor). HIGH-RISK group: no doc edit. recommended=sonnet-high: destructive ordered Steps 0-6 close + threshold ladder + compact orchestration.
